title: oncerum nutans
intro: Oncerum nutans, also known as the 'Drop Necklace' or 'Drop Necklace Plant', is a flowering plant native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its root, which is used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Oncerum nutans include its ability to reduce pain and swelling, as well as its potential to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Oncerum nutans include teas and infusions made from the dried root, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
